targets.expr:
kube_pod_info{node=~"$node", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}
# attach the phase (Running/Pending/Succeeded/Failed/Unknown)
* on(namespace, pod) group_left(phase)
  (kube_pod_status_phase{namespace=~"$namespace"} == 1)
# attach age in seconds
* on(namespace, pod) group_left()
  (time() - kube_pod_start_time{namespace=~"$namespace"})

panels.description: Filesystem usage percentage for the selected PVC. Scoped by the namespace / pvc / pod variables passed from the PVC table drilldown.
panels.title: PVC Usage % over time

list.definition: query_result(kube_pod_spec_volumes_persistentvolumeclaims_info{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}    * on(namespace, pod) group_left(node)      kube_pod_info{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"})
list.label: pvc
list.name: pvc

query.query: query_result(kube_pod_spec_volumes_persistentvolumeclaims_info{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}    * on(namespace, pod) group_left(node)      kube_pod_info{namespace=~"$namespace", node=~"$node"})
